subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of Abbud in Akka, 1915-01-04
subcodes.first_line: These childish demonstrations are most shallow in their motives, because they are based on the conquest of the earth which in itself is not permanent.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
